email_templates.title: Email Templates
email_templates.description: Maintain optional custom subjects and copy for system emails. When disabled, the runtime falls back to the built-in template.
email_templates.selector_hint: Pick a template first, then edit the copy for each locale.
email_templates.preview_locale_hint: Preview resolves the copy through the locale fallback chain.
email_templates.custom_enabled_hint: When disabled, the system default stays active. When enabled, only the filled fields override the default.
email_templates.no_variables: This template does not expose extra variables.

preview_samples.title: Momei Release Notes
preview_samples.summary: Latest issue roundup, release notes and recommended articles.

field_hints.title: Variables such as {appName} are supported.
field_hints.preheader: Shown in the inbox preview on most email clients. Keep it concise.
field_hints.message: Supports HTML snippets and template variables for the main content block.
field_hints.buttonText: Action-oriented templates render this string on the primary CTA button.
field_hints.reminderContent: Use this area for fallback links, expiry notes and extra reminders.
field_hints.authorLabel: Prefix label for author info in marketing emails.
field_hints.categoryLabel: Prefix label for category info in marketing emails.
field_hints.dateLabel: Prefix label for publish date in marketing emails.

variables.expiresIn: Validity window in minutes for codes or links.
variables.title: Article or campaign title used by marketing emails.
variables.summary: Summary body used by marketing emails.

verification.label: Verification Link
verification.description: Sent after signup to verify the email address.

defaults.title: Verify Your {appName} Email Address
defaults.preheader: Welcome to {appName}! Please verify your email address to complete registration.
defaults.message: Thank you for registering with {appName}! To ensure your account security, please click the button below to verify your email address.
defaults.reminderContent:
• This verification link will expire in 24 hours
• If you did not register an account with {appName}, please ignore this email
• Do not share this link with others to protect your account
defaults.securityTip: {appName} will never ask you for your password, verification code, or other sensitive information via email.

passwordReset.label: Password Reset Link
passwordReset.description: Used by the password reset flow.

defaults.title: Reset Your {appName} Password
defaults.preheader: Someone requested to reset your password. If this was you, please click the link.
defaults.message: Someone requested to reset your {appName} account password. If this was you, please click the button below to reset your password:
defaults.reminderContent:
• This reset link will expire in 1 hour
• If this was not you, please check your account security immediately
• We recommend changing your password and enabling two-factor authentication
defaults.securityTip: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email and check your account security.

loginOTP.label: Login OTP
loginOTP.description: One-time code sent for email sign-in.

defaults.title: Your {appName} Login Verification Code
defaults.preheader: This is your one-time login verification code
defaults.message: You are attempting to log in to {appName}. Please use the verification code below to complete your login:
defaults.reminderContent:
• This verification code will expire in {expiresIn} minutes
• The verification code is valid only for this login
• Do not share this code with others
defaults.securityTip: If this was not you, please ignore this email and check your account security.

emailVerificationOTP.label: Email Verification OTP
emailVerificationOTP.description: Code used when verifying or binding an email address.

defaults.title: Verify Your {appName} Email Address
defaults.preheader: Your email verification code has been sent
defaults.message: You are verifying an email address to associate with your {appName} account. Please use the verification code below to complete the verification:
defaults.reminderContent:
• This verification code will expire in {expiresIn} minutes
• If you did not request email verification, please ignore this email
• Do not share this code with others
defaults.securityTip: {appName} will never proactively ask you for your verification code via email.

passwordResetOTP.label: Password Reset OTP
passwordResetOTP.description: Code used by password reset verification.

defaults.title: Reset Your {appName} Password
defaults.preheader: Your password reset verification code has been sent
defaults.message: You are resetting your {appName} account password. Please use the verification code below to complete the reset:
defaults.reminderContent:
• This verification code will expire in {expiresIn} minutes
• If this was not you, please check your account security immediately
• Do not share this code with others
defaults.securityTip: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email and check your account security.

defaults.title: Your {appName} Passwordless Login Link
defaults.preheader: Click the link to log in quickly
defaults.message: You requested a passwordless login. Please click the link below to log in to your {appName} account:
defaults.reminderContent:
• This login link will expire in 30 minutes
• This link is valid only for you
• If you did not request to log in, please ignore this email
defaults.securityTip: If this was not you, please ignore this email and check your account security.

defaults.title: Confirm Your New Email Address
defaults.preheader: Confirm your new email address to complete the email change
defaults.message: You are changing your {appName} account email address to this email. Please click the button below to confirm:
defaults.reminderContent:
• This confirmation link will expire in 24 hours
• Your email will only be changed after you complete this confirmation
• If you did not request to change your email, please ignore this email
defaults.securityTip: {appName} will never ask you for your password or other sensitive information via email.

securityNotification.label: Security Notification
securityNotification.description: Alert sent after sign-in or other sensitive actions.

defaults.title: {appName} Security Alert
defaults.preheader: A new login activity has been detected on your account
defaults.message: We detected new login activity on your {appName} account:
defaults.reminderContent:
• If this was you, you can ignore this email
• If you did not authorize this activity, please change your password immediately
• To protect your account, we recommend enabling two-factor authentication
defaults.securityTip: If you have any concerns about your account security, please contact us immediately: {contactEmail}

subscriptionConfirmation.label: Subscription Confirmation
subscriptionConfirmation.description: Welcome email sent after a successful subscription.

defaults.title: Subscription Confirmed - {appName}
defaults.message: Thank you for subscribing to {appName}! You have successfully subscribed to our email newsletter.
defaults.reminderContent:
• You will regularly receive our latest articles and updates
• You can unsubscribe at any time using the "Unsubscribe" link at the bottom of our emails
• If you wish to modify your subscription settings, please visit your account preferences
defaults.securityTip: This email address is associated with your subscription. Please do not forward this email to others.

marketingCampaign.label: Marketing / Distribution
marketingCampaign.description: Used by article distribution and marketing campaigns.
